title: write-assist Multi-LLM Writing Pipeline
summary: Overview of the write-assist repository, focusing on its ensemble-based multi-LLM architecture for legal academic writing. It details the 3-phase pipeline and the implementation of a functional research phase for the DrafterAgent. This phase uses a text-based ReAct pattern to integrate Google Custom Search while prioritizing the local cite-assist database. The KI also documents the hybrid testing strategy (integration + async mocks), a comprehensive user guide, and technical implementation challenges like type-hinting and pre-commit strictness.
